idea.title: El Poder de la Sentadilla Estática (Wall Sit) Pro
idea.hook: ¿Qué pasa si haces 60 segundos de sentadilla en pared durante 30 días?

scenes.image_prompt: Hyper-realistic 3D render of a minimalist male fitness character, solid matte red skin, powerful muscular build, completely smooth and flat face with no eyes, no nose, and no mouth, seamless egg-like head wearing sleek black over-ear headphones, wearing black athletic shorts, leaning against a dark studio wall in a 90-degree sitting pose, looking at a floating holographic stopwatch showing 60 seconds, environment: dark cinematic gym void with red rim lighting and global illumination, black studio floor with subtle reflections, ultra-high detail, Unreal Engine 5 render style, 8k, dark atmospheric mood
scenes.narration: ¿Qué pasa si haces 60 segundos de sentadilla en pared durante 30 días? Es el experimento definitivo.

scenes.image_prompt: Hyper-realistic 3D render of a minimalist male fitness character, solid matte red skin, muscular build, smooth face, headphones, in a wall sit pose, legs trembling slightly to show effort, environment: dark cinematic void, red rim lighting, ultra-high detail, 8k
scenes.narration: El primer día parecerá fácil, pero para el segundo, tus piernas empezarán a temblar.

scenes.image_prompt: Hyper-realistic 3D render of a minimalist male fitness character, solid matte red skin, muscles in the thighs glowing with orange heat energy, wall sit pose against a dark wall, environment: dark atmospheric studio, 8k render
scenes.narration: En la primera semana, tus cuádriceps arderán como nunca. El dolor es debilidad saliendo de tu cuerpo.

scenes.image_prompt: Hyper-realistic 3D render of a minimalist male fitness character, solid matte red skin, smooth face, headphones, close up of the leg muscles flexing intensely, environment: dark studio, cinematic lighting, 8k
scenes.narration: Este ejercicio isométrico recluta fibras musculares que las sentadillas normales a veces ignoran.

scenes.image_prompt: Hyper-realistic 3D render of a minimalist male fitness character, solid matte red skin, smooth face, headphones, wall sit pose with a floating holographic blood pressure icon, environment: dark cinematic void, 8k
scenes.narration: Dato científico: Mantener esta postura reduce la presión arterial de forma drástica y natural.

scenes.image_prompt: Hyper-realistic 3D render of a minimalist male fitness character, solid matte red skin, smooth face, headphones, perfect posture against the wall, spine aligned, environment: dark atmospheric studio, 8k
scenes.narration: Para la segunda semana, tu equilibrio mejora y tu postura se vuelve mucho más sólida y erguida.

scenes.image_prompt: Hyper-realistic 3D render of a minimalist male fitness character, solid matte red skin, smooth face, headphones, performing the wall sit with extreme focus and calm, environment: dark cinematic void, 8k
scenes.narration: Tus articulaciones se fortalecen sin el impacto de los saltos o el peso excesivo.

scenes.image_prompt: Hyper-realistic 3D render of a minimalist male fitness character, solid matte red skin, smooth face, headphones, close up of the knees perfectly aligned over the feet, environment: dark studio, red lighting, 8k
scenes.narration: Advertencia: Mantén tus rodillas alineadas. Nunca dejes que pasen la punta de tus pies.

scenes.image_prompt: Hyper-realistic 3D render of a minimalist male fitness character, solid matte red skin, smooth face, headphones, standing up after the wall sit with powerful defined legs, environment: dark atmospheric studio, 8k
scenes.narration: Al finalizar los 30 días, tendrás piernas de acero y una resistencia cardiovascular sorprendente.

scenes.image_prompt: Hyper-realistic 3D render of a minimalist male fitness character, solid matte red skin, smooth face, headphones, pointing to the viewer with authority, environment: dark cinematic gym void, red rim lighting, 8k
scenes.narration: ¿Tú ya dominas la pared o crees que necesitas pesas para tonificar? ¡Cuéntame en los comentarios!
